title: lycopodium scariosum var. microphyllum
intro: Lycopodium scariosum var. microphyllum, also known as the dwarf club moss, is a small to medium-sized, evergreen, perennial plant belonging to the Lycopodiaceae family. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant qualities. The health benefits of Lycopodium scariosum var. microphyllum include its ability to relieve respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to aid in the treatment of digestive problems and skin conditions. The plant can be prepared as a tincture, infusion, or dried extract, and is often used in herbal remedies to promote overall well-being and alleviate various health complaints.
